best_stack_delta.summary: A2 repair: no-flag raw-pool global-association profile selection now resolves only through tracking.global_association_profile. Clip-keyed Burlington/Wolverine/Outdoor profiles are preserved as explicit eval/internal-val choices in a dormant manifest entry, not as hidden no-flag defaults.

acceptance.metric: A2 verifier attack, unmodified evidence pytest
acceptance.baseline: Verifier report at runs/lanes/beststack_verify_20260709/report.json found Burlington/Outdoor no-flag clip IDs resolved association profiles outside best_stack.json.
acceptance.target: Verifier's A2 attack passes exactly as written.

acceptance.baseline: Verifier's original BallTrack fixture was schema-invalid, so A1 could not provide a clean attribution result.
acceptance.target: Rerun A1 with a schema-valid BallTrack fixture without weakening the allowed-diff check.

acceptance.baseline: Verifier's original invalid BallTrack fixture prevented a valid events-before-frames/contact-density proof.
acceptance.after: A3_events_before_frames PASS: contact_windows_identical=true, events_selected_identical=true, worktree_contact_selected_frame_count=1, trigger_counts={events:1, proximity:1, swing:1, uniform_fill:0}, frames_schedule_source=frame_compute_plan.json.
acceptance.target: Rerun A3 with a schema-valid fixture and prove frames consume a contact-dense plan.
MPLBACKEND=Agg, no fail-fast: best_stack tests, process_video tests, and tests/server all pass.

acceptance.metric: grep proof for no hidden clip-keyed no-flag selector
acceptance.baseline: process_video.py contained clip-ID branches for Burlington/Outdoor/Wolverine profile defaults.
acceptance.after: rg -n 'burlington_gold_0300_low_steep_corner|outdoor_webcam_iynbd_1500_long_high_baseline|wolverine_mixed_0200_mid_steep_corner' scripts/racketsport/process_video.py produced no matches. The remaining process_video.py association fallback sites are DEFAULT_GLOBAL_ASSOCIATION_PROFILE reads from the manifest.
acceptance.target: No process_video clip-ID hardcode remains on the no-flag association decision path.

changes: configs/racketsport/best_stack.json:192 kept tracking.global_association_profile value unchanged and clarified it is the no-flag production profile for every clip.

configs/racketsport/best_stack.json:209 added tracking.eval_only_association_profiles as DORMANT, declaring the Burlington/Wolverine/Outdoor clip-keyed profiles as explicit eval/internal-val selections only.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:1152 changed raw-pool global association no-flag fallback to DEFAULT_GLOBAL_ASSOCIATION_PROFILE.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:4635 made _default_raw_pool_authority_profile_for_clip return the manifest-owned default for all clips.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:4868 changed resolved_best_stack_config_from_options to report the manifest default unless an explicit CLI profile override is provided.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:5232 updated --global-association-profile help text to remove the old Burlington no-flag exception.
tests/racketsport/test_best_stack_manifest.py:16 updated integrity expectations to rev5 and the new dormant eval-only association row.
tests/racketsport/test_best_stack_resolution.py:101 added the real parser/options regression for Burlington/Outdoor/Wolverine no-flag association profile resolution plus explicit override precedence.

tests/racketsport/test_process_video.py:2674 updated the older process-video association profile fixture to assert manifest default no-flag behavior while preserving explicit eval profile config coverage.
runs/lanes/beststack_core_20260708/rerun_a1_a3_valid_fixture.py:1 added the allowed lane evidence runner for schema-valid A1/A3 reruns.
honest_issues: configs/ssh/a100_known_hosts remains a pre-existing unrelated tracked diff in the working tree; I did not edit it.
Unrelated untracked brand-exploration and cvat_upload package artifacts remain in the working tree; I did not touch them.

A1/A3 rerun used a lane-local evidence runner because the verifier's original fixture was schema-invalid. The runner imports the verifier fixture and changes the ball fixture to schema-valid wasb frames plus four tracked players so the contact-density attack is meaningful; it is still a lightweight monkeypatched pipeline fixture, not a CV quality run.
No protected court files, threed/racketsport/mhr_decode*.py, threed/racketsport/hmr_deep.py, web/replay, ios, root Markdown, synthetic gate files, or board files were edited.
next: Manager can review and commit the rev5 A2 repair. Suggested checklist bullet: [W7 BESTSTACK A2 REPAIR] rev5 declares clip-keyed association profiles as eval-only manifest entries and routes all no-flag association defaults through tracking.global_association_profile; verifier A2 plus valid-fixture A1/A3 and blast-radius tests pass.
